# AllOverIt.ReactiveUI.Wpf

## Purpose
This package contains utility extensions for use with ReactiveUI and WPF.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.ReactiveUI.Wpf/AllOverIt.ReactiveUI.Wpf.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0-windows10.0.19041;net9.0-windows10.0.19041;net8.0-windows10.0.19041
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, Reactive, ReactiveUI, WPF
- Depends on: AllOverIt.ReactiveUI

- class ReactiveWindowViewHandler
- class ServiceCollectionExtensions
